analysis.construction_strategy: 1. Create a rectangular sketch of 110mm x 55mm and extrude to an arbitrary or standard thickness. 2. Create a circular sketch of diameter 8mm. 3. Apply a linear pattern to the circle with a count of 8. 4. Perform a cut operation through the base plate.
analysis.overall_shape: A rectangular flat plate with a linear array of eight circular holes centered along the horizontal axis.
analysis.title: LINEAR PERFORATIONS - VARIANT 5

uncertainties.description: The thickness of the solid part is not specified in the drawing.
The center-to-center distance (pitch) between the 8 holes is not explicitly dimensioned.
The vertical and horizontal offsets (margins) for the hole pattern relative to the plate edges are not specified.
Hole depth is inferred as through-all for a perforation, but not explicitly stated.

views.description: Plan view showing the rectangular plate and linear hole pattern
